base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of font_dialogue_color_variants — a ui (typography) from 1986 legend of zelda. Color variants of dialogue font — red (important text / item names) + orange + yellow + cyan palette alternatives. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Color variants of dialogue font — red (important text / item names) + orange + yellow + cyan palette alternatives
